segments.text: First listen and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: What does a cold welcome refer to?
On Wednesday evening we went to the town hall.

translations.zh-Hans: 星期三晚上，我们去了市政厅。

segments.text: It was the last day of the year and a large crowd of people had gathered under the town hall clock.

translations.zh-Hans: 那是一年的最后一天，一大群人聚集在市政厅的大钟下面。

segments.text: It would strike twelve in twenty minutes' time.

translations.zh-Hans: 再过20分钟，大钟将敲响12点。

segments.text: Fifteen minutes passed and then, at five to twelve, the clock stopped.

translations.zh-Hans: 15分钟过去了，就在11点55分时，大钟停了。

segments.text: The big minute hand did not move.
We waited and waited, but nothing happened.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们等了又等，却什么也没有发生。

segments.text: Suddenly someone shouted, It's two minutes past twelve.

translations.zh-Hans: 突然有人喊道：“已经过12点两分钟了！”

segments.text: The big clock refused to welcome the new year.

translations.zh-Hans: 这座大钟拒绝迎接新年。

segments.text: At that moment, everybody began to laugh and sing.

translations.zh-Hans: 就在那一刻，大家开始又笑又唱。
